series_metadata.series_title: Migrant Seasonal Farm Worker Activity Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Quarterly and annual reports of One Stop office Migrant Outreach staff employment service delivery activities, such as worker registrations, referrals, placements and other supportive services, including web site activity detailing job openings. File also includes documentation regarding worker concerns and problems surrounding these activities, and recommendations to resolve same, as well as a log of complaints received. Reports are sent to the Department of Labor (DOL)

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office ; Electronic: in office
